series_metadata.series_description: System that helps track and manage investigations and prosecutions handled by the Health Care Fraud section. System contains, but is not limited to, case information (suspects, defendants, charges, sentences, significant events, etc.), agent activities, evidence control documentation, supporting files, calendar appointments, and some financial-related information (restitutions, investigation costs, civil recoveries, etc.) related to case work.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain 20 years after case closure. ; Paper: Retain 20 years after case closure, unless scanned and saved electronically., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
